JavaScript bindings, native functions, and header files for mbed operations in JerryScript, including assert, DigitalOut, I2C, InterruptIn, and timers.

## Folders
- **[source](source/README.md)**: JavaScript bindings and native functions for mbed operations, including assert, DigitalOut, I2C, and timers.

## Files
- **[assert-js.h](assert-js.h.md)**: Declares a global function for JavaScript assertions in the JerryScript mbed environment.
- **[DigitalOut-js.h](DigitalOut-js.h.md)**: Header file for declaring the constructor of the DigitalOut class in the JerryScript mbed drivers.
- **[gc-js.h](gc-js.h.md)**: Header file for declaring a global garbage collection function in JerryScript for Mbed OS.
- **[I2C-js.h](I2C-js.h.md)**: Header file for declaring the I2C class constructor in the JerryScript mbed drivers.
- **[InterruptIn-js.h](InterruptIn-js.h.md)**: Header file for declaring the constructor of the InterruptIn class in JerryScript Mbed drivers.
- **[lib_drivers.h](lib_drivers.h.md)**: Registers JavaScript wrapper functions and class constructors for mbed drivers in JerryScript.
- **[setInterval-js.h](setInterval-js.h.md)**: Declares a global function for `setInterval` in the JerryScript mbed drivers.
- **[setTimeout-js.h](setTimeout-js.h.md)**: Declares a global function `setTimeout` for the JerryScript mbed drivers.
